messages.content: We lost our joint family system but if we our institution of marriage becomes loose then we will become like the west rich but unhappy.

I hv been a supporter of rituals in marriage and marriage being a bit costly. when we invest our life into something we make sure it works. If 2 people become a couple just by signing a piece of paper, tom they will decouple by signing another piece of paper which is what is happening elsewhere in the world. And broken marriages give rise unhappy children and unhappy parents and unhappy people are very good for the economy.
